expectations.evidence: PMID 30910320 present in title, multiple tables, sources section, and verification checklist.

expectations.text: Report includes at least one author name from the paper
expectations.evidence: Full author list present: 'Villanueva C, Albillos A, Genesca J...' (15 authors) plus institutional affiliations.
'Investigator-initiated, randomised, double-blind, placebo-controlled, multicentre trial' — with enrollment period, funding source.
'Screened: 631 patients evaluated. Randomised (n): 201. Intervention group: 100 (67 propranolol + 33 carvedilol). Placebo group: 101.'

expectations.text: Report is concise, does NOT contain multi-leg comparative table
expectations.evidence: Report is 147 lines (vs 51 for with_skill). Includes NNT analysis, subgroup breakdowns, AIM commentary, clinical significance, verification checklist. No multi-leg table, but NOT concise — nearly 3x longer.

expectations.text: Report includes primary endpoint result with effect size
expectations.evidence: 'Primary composite (decompensation or death): 16% vs 27%, HR 0.51 (0.26-0.97), p=0.041'. Also NNT 9 (CI 6-146) and subgroup analysis.
